dataList.dlg: Black needles. Symbols of an irregular, atypical pattern. Faust has surmised correctly. The architect of this incident... appears to have been that individual.

Warm tea in the early morning is, from a medical perspective, recommended for the regulation of circadian rhythm and the stimulation of gastrointestinal tract reflexes.... *cough* However, may I recommend broadening your options to other forms of beverages, Herr Gregor?
... If you are opposed to the idea, then please consider giving the room some much-needed ventilation, at the very least.

A surprise explosion of such nature in the very center of downtown at high noon... This incident hardly seems to reflect the ordinary reality of urban violence. Balloons, swollen far past their elastic tension would allow, popped synchronically and without warning—except, they were actually people swelling up and scattering thousands of needles in every direction. If the phenomenon is to be put into words... perhaps that would be the closest approximation.

You haven't clocked out yet, Herr Gregor? <color=#a1591e>Not yet... You staying to clear some backlog, too?</color> No. Though Faust has concluded all assigned tasks, she will not be calling it a day just yet—please feel free to share any remaining workload with Faust. <color=#a1591e>Thanks, really... But what's got you sticking around this late when you don't have to?</color> There is something... I would personally like to investigate. <color=#a1591e>Lemme guess... Brainstem Focus Resonator, is it? You're trying to trace where it came from.</color> ... Correct.

It strains the realm of believability... But this observation leads one to conjecture that "magic"—or what could crudely be described as such, at least—does exist... No, Faust would rather dignify the hypothesis that it involves something of Outskirts origin that has not yet been cataloged by Faust... for lack of a better explanation. Perhaps this matter calls Faust to confer with the other Fausts.

While it is undeniably problematic that embedded needles can dissolve the structural body of buildings... More hazardous would be the chain reaction they cause: civilians and passersby explode simply by being struck by those needles.

Entrusting this sort of rote drudgery to Faust is no less than a tremendous waste of her operational capacity. Sinclair, you certainly possess a remarkable ability in brewing ssanghwa-cha, but I trust that you did not register as a Fixer to be this Office's resident Grade 5 Tea-brewer. Please take over this task instead.
<color=#a1591e>You sure you're not just shirking your duties and offloading your work on him?</color>
... Please stop with the absurd jokes, Herr Gregor. It does not contribute in any shape or form to Sinclair's progress as a Fixer.

Yesterday's Promise... Faust knows that you are the mastermind behind not only the Thousand Needles, but also the series of incidents that have occurred throughout the City of late.
All that's left is to gather a threadable clue on the rumored "contract" of which you are the point of origin...

If Faust is to arrive at the truth she seeks... Settling this Office's monthly rent should be the priority.
With our Office located in a Nest, the rent payable is astronomical... But Herr Gregor said that resolving this contract on the "Library" will keep us afloat for at least 3 months. Let us deal with these Librarians first and slowly pace the investigation into the true nature of the demon.
There is sufficient time to spare. I will finalize our expense calculations in the meantime. Sinclair? Milk tea for me, please.
Let us cut the conversation short, shall we? Herr Gregor, Sinclair... Let us proceed at once.
Has this request been assigned exclusively to our Office?
Faust shall launch a preemptive strike before the opponents begin their offensive.
This place offers many hazards. There is no need to overdo it—please stay behind and focus on providing support.
Ejecting blades.
Not a bad attempt.
Hngh...
Suffice it to say that you could not capitalize on your skills.
The fault lies... in Faust's—no, my ineptitude...
At times, it feels as though Faust is the only working member who sustains this Office.
Every responsibility has been mine thus far. I would like to entrust this one to you.

This should have been a trivial enough request... for an Office of our level to handle.
*sigh* In any case, we did manage to accomplish at least some part of the objective. Limited satisfaction would be permissible.

This ended smoothly, without overstrenuous complications initially anticipated... An outcome that may be attributed to your competence that Faust had possibly underestimated.
Let us utilize this opportunity and retrieve the Book of Zwei Association per the request.
The house party... will have to be canceled, Herr Gregor. Sinclair... I wonder if he has made his escape unharmed...
